query:
SELECT 
  id,
  customerName,
  customerEmail,
  customerPhone,
  status,
  stripeSubscriptionId,
  downPaymentAmount,
  membershipPackageId,
  createdAt
FROM enrollments
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
